reviews.review_description: Really wish it didn't end after the first boss, especially since it's called Pioneer: ENDLESS Journey. This game is really fun and addictive! One of the best free games on the Meta Quest store even!
That is all
Great freebee. Took me some time to beat the Scorpion King because I play sitting but was a wonderful time. Give the game a try what is there to lose.

reviews.review_title: Just wish there were more silly things
reviews.review_description:
1. You should be able to push a button or do a motion to be able to spin the gun endlessly until you do another motion 😢
2. Meet npcs randomly 
3. MULTIPLAYER 😁😁😁😁

The concept is great but the gameplay is just alright.  The gun feels like a pea-shooter and sight upgrades are opaque so they don't actually assist with aiming unless they also provide a laser dot.
Lastly, there are no sound settings.  I would love to be able to turn the music off.

Great game but y'all were poor on execution and have forgotten it, optimally if y'all were to update it needs better pacing and for some of the enemies such as the big cactus Bois and the MoleRatKings to either be a very late game thing or massively nerfed, also the Big Cactus Needs a Crit Spot.

When i first saw this game it looked cool and it was free so i got it idk if the creator has given up on this because this is really good and it’s been released for at least 2 years and still no second world but for a free game this is awsome and should be seen way more the only problem with this is that there is not much replay value and if there were more to it i this would be one of my favorite games i have played on my quest so far
Great game! Fun and entertaining! Can't wait for full version! My only issue is I feel like sometimes the bosses are too overpowered, I Would love a story mode!
Good game but sound and weapon design could use some work.
It's been too long

Note for dev: Please add a discord link!

I think this game is better than Compound or Mothergunship. I'd say that replayability can be taken one step further if the dev let users make community maps. RNG with enemy-buffs could also increase the replayability.

A pure melee build option would be fantastic!

Since this a single player game, it could have multiplayer elements if players could invade each other's games similar to Dark Souls, but players could toggle off this option.

I agree with others' suggestions that there should be one checkpoint per boss.

OMG
I don't use such silly terminology lightly.

This is a great game. It is perfect for VR. Its fun, its fast, its clear, its varied!

Its a roguelike with a map system reminiscent of Slay the Spire, and a really solid feeling FPS to compliment.

The main feature is your ever upgrading and changing gun which, again, is clearly presented and very fun to explore.

Please!!!! Make this full game!
Add more guns, elements, and story!!!
An infinite mode would really appreciated!!

I have shown it to a lot of people and they are also enchanted by it. The artsyle is cool and easy for everyone to interpret.

Keep going! Its a game I'm very excited to buy!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your comment :)
We're so impressed with your long long review!

reviews.review_description:
You can see this game in my top 10 app lab list here: https://youtu.be/bwGl1PFWceA

Or just search 'VR Reviews' in YouTube.

This one was a nice surprise. Great gameplay and game mechanics. Give it a go. It's free!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your comment :)
We enjoyed your video, and it is a great honor for us to be included in your Top Ten!

reviews.review_title: The most addictive game on Oculus for me
reviews.review_description:
I grabbed this game out of sheer boredom, tried it once, and I've probably logged more hours in this game than any other I own besides Supernatural. It's just plain fun. Everything just feels good in the game. 

I only wish there was more. I've more or less learned the optimal path to beating chapter 1. I wish there was more content at this point. I would buy this game in a heartbeat.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your comment :)
We're happy to hear that you enjoyed this game a lot!

reviews.review_description: This is a quality rogue-lite with great sense of fun about it, with colourful and cartoon-like environments and enemies. The game-play is great and I'm enjoying this more than similar games on the official store.  And it's free!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your comment :)
We're happy to hear that you enjoy this game

reviews.review_description: This game is a blast!!  I just need smooth tuning plz.  Loving this game, giving me  Nuclear Throne vibes.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your comment :)
We're working on more detailed settings.

reviews.review_description: Holy moly this game is great!! Not even the best quality but still.. ITS AWESOME i always wanted an game like this😂 nice job keep up the good work
This game would be better with multiplayer but over all amazing game love it. Keep up the good work!!!

reviews.review_title: One of the best vr games
reviews.review_description: This game is amazing with it design and gameplay the guns are fun to use and the orbs are amazing to throw however my only problem is that it’s hard and there isn’t enough health around but otherwise the game is great and I love that you can use the environment to help you kill enemies easily

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your comment :)
This is not an easy game. So you will feel more satisfied when you overcome it!

reviews.review_description: The game is really simple and fun, it has some cool weapon mods and a nice gameplay loop. I think multiplayer would be an awesome addition to this game, and also some quality-of-life improvements as well (I lost count of how many times I was completely lost on where to look after using the jump pad to go up a level). Overall, if you're looking for a good way to have some fun, I highly recommend giving this game a try!
